title: geniostoma tinifolium
intro: Geniostoma tinifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae, commonly known as the 'maile plant'. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Hawaiian medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The leaves and flowers of Geniostoma tinifolium contain flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Geniostoma tinifolium can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
